case_title: JEFFREY M SAARMAN VS. PENNY CHOW

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,777.00 FILED BY SAARMAN, JEFFREY M AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, PENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAARMAN, JEFFREY M AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, PENNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.
